java.lang/Math/fma.name: fma
signatures: public static double fma(double a, double b, double c)
public static float fma(float a, float b, float c)
java.lang/Math/fma.description:
Returns the fused multiply add of the three arguments; that is,
returns the exact product of the first two arguments summed
with the third argument and then rounded once to the nearestdouble.

info.excerpt:
Returns the fused multiply add of the three arguments; that is,
returns the exact product of the first two arguments summed
with the third argument and then rounded once to the nearestdouble.
